data.acceptance:
1. When user creates a new beat: queue and active screens display changes within 1 second (verify with Chrome DevTools Network tab or Playwright network monitoring)
2. When user modifies beat state/attributes: queue and active screens update within 1 second
3. Non-user-initiated events (e.g., background syncs) still follow the 10-second polling interval
4. Use Playwright to write an automated test that: creates/updates a beat, monitors the fetch/update event, and asserts the refresh completes within 1 second
5. Verify in browser DevTools that no unnecessary refreshes are triggered by other events
